//: Deno configuration file (equivalent to package.json + tsconfig.json).
Deno uses a single JSON file (deno.json or deno.jsonc) as its manifest.
There is no node_modules/ and no package-lock.json; dependency versions
are pinned in `imports` below and a deno.lock file is generated next to
'ethers' are rewritten to their canonical URL/npm spec.
- `npm:`     : first-class npm interop. Deno downloads packages on
demand and caches them in the global DENO_DIR.
- `compilerOptions`: forwarded to the embedded TypeScript compiler.
Deno bundles its own TS toolchain, so no tsc install.
deno task check    (type-check only, equivalent to `tsc --noEmit`)
deno task smoke    (execute the smoke test)
